title: The Incredibly Strange Creatures Who Stopped Living and Became Mixed-Up Zombies!!?
writer: Gene Pollock, Robert Silliphant, E.M. Kevke
actors: Ray Dennis Steckler, Brett O'Hara, Atlas King
plot: Jerry falls in love with a stripper he meets at a carnival. Little does he know that she is the sister of a gypsy fortune teller whose predictions he had scoffed at earlier. The gypsy turns him into a zombie and he goes on a killi...
